body.title: Add disk-sweep + size-cap to reasoning_cache
body.result: Shipped in 640d0438. Sweep runs every N puts (default 100), deletes entries >2×TTL old, then evicts oldest-by-mtime until ≤IGOR_REASONING_CACHE_MAX (default 5000). env-tunable. 6 tests cover TTL expiry, size cap, empty/missing dir, put-hook cadence, disable-via-N=0.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 3 Finding P4 (SHIP). reasoning_cache was a file-backed TTL cache that only deleted entries on next read attempt — no proactive hygiene. Disk usage grew unbounded under cache-miss patterns. Added periodic sweep triggered ~1 in N put() calls (default 100, env IGOR_REASONING_CACHE_SWEEP_EVERY): deletes entries older than 2×TTL by mtime; then if still over cap, evicts oldest-by-mtime until at/under IGOR_REASONING_CACHE_MAX (default 5000).

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/reasoning_cache.py, tests/test_reasoning_cache_sweep.py (new).
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — sweep helper + put-hook + size cap. OUT — in-memory LRU layer (unnecessary); changing cache key / TTL / invalidate_on semantics.
**Test plan:** 6 tests — deletes entries older than 2×TTL, caps directory size (evicting oldest), empty-dir safe, missing-dir safe, sweep runs every N puts, sweep disabled when N=0.
